summary: QFInHub engines overall healthy: HARO (22 responses), Newsjack (34 published), and Widget Outreach (39 targets) all active and running on schedule. Build passed from last night's commit (Mobile performance improvements). Critical issue: all X/Twitter engines paused for 5 days due to anti-bot detection — a stealth browser rebuild plan exists but needs execution. A 39-hour gateway outage (May 17-18) was self-healed; monitor 3 daily jobs catching up today. Zero auto-fixes applied this week (the one HIGH issue requires code changes).
